chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S-60 of 2023 (Muhammad Yousif Vs. Faqeer Muhammad & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non-prosecution. 27-11-2023. Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ******** On remand of the case for denovo trial; the instant Crl. Revision Application for enhancement of sentence having become in-fructuous, is dismissed accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
